title: Get a list of conversations
content:
Use this endpoint to get a list of conversations. >**Note**
> - Only the conversations from the past 90 days are accessible, and a maximum of 100 conversations will be returned. ## Before you start Because of the sensitive nature of direct message data, TikTok has implemented a higher level of due diligence for developers that will process direct messages on behalf of Business Account users. Ensure that you [have completed the necessary data security and privacy reviews and obtained access to Business Messaging API](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1832184145137922) before calling this endpoint. ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/business/message/conversation/list/ **Method** GET **Header** ```xtable |Field{35%}|Type{15%}|Description{50%}| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|A short-term access token authorized by the TikTok Business Account owner.
For details, see [Authentication](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1832184175482945).| ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field{35%}|Type{15%}|Description{50%}| |--- |--- |--- | | business_id {Required}| string | Application specific unique identifier for the TikTok Business Account.

Pass the value of the `open_id` field returned in the response of [/tt_user/oauth2/token/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1832184175482945#item-link-Obtain%20a%20short-term%20access%20token) to this field. | | conversation_type {Required}| string | Conversation type.

Currently, the only allowed values are:
  • `STRANGER`: Conversations with users who have sent a message to the Business Account of the business, but the business has not yet accepted the message request and responded to the message.
  • `SINGLE`: One-on-one conversations with users who have sent a message to the Business Account of the business, and the business has previously responded to the user.
| | limit | integer | The maximum number of conversations to return for this request.

Value range: 1-100.
Default value: 100. | | cursor | integer | Cursor for pagination.

If the response parameter `has_more` is `true`, pass the returned `cursor` value in this parameter in the subsequent request to receive the next page of conversations.

Default value: 0. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request GET 'https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/business/message/conversation/list/?business_id={{business_id}}&conversation_type=SINGLE' \ --header 'Access-Token:{{Access-Token}}' (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field{35%}|Type{15%}|Description{50%}| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix-Return Code](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1737172488964097). | |message|string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |request_id |string|The log ID of a request, which uniquely identifies the request. | |data |object|Returned data.| #| conversations | object[] | Conversation List. | ##| conversation_id | string | Conversation ID.

Example: `a1AbcBdeCfghDijkEF2b3+lmGn==`. | ##| update_time | integer | The time of the last message in the conversation, in the format of an Epoch/Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

Example: `1719447205701`. | ##| referral | object | Referral information of the conversation. | ###| ad | object[] | Related referral ad information of the conversation, including all historical referral ads of the conversation. | ####| advertiser_id | string | The ID of the advertiser account that is associated with the ad. | ####| ad_id | string | Ad ID of the related ad.

Example: `1234567891234567`.

The types of data you can get from this metric include:
  • The ID of a [Manual Ad](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1735735524758530).
  • The ID of an ad within a [Smart+ Campaign](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1765314260115458).
  • The ID of a creative within an [Upgraded Smart+ Ad](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1843310530260097).
| ####| timestamp | integer | The time of the referral event, in the format of an Epoch/Unix timestamp in seconds.

Example: `1714430514`. | ####| ad_name | string | The name of the related ad. | ####| embed_url | string | An embeddable link for the TikTok post used in the related ad.
This URL can be used to embed the TikTok post in external websites or applications.
If the privacy setting of the post is "Friends" or "Only you", the post will not be viewable through this link. | ####| message_material_id|string|Material ID.

The encoded ID of a creative within [Upgraded Smart+ Ads](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1843310530260097).| ###| short_link | object[] | Information about the tiktok.me link.
A tiktok.me link is a shareable TikTok shortlink that allows users to initiate a one-on-one conversation with a business in the TikTok App. | ####| ref | string | The referral parameter (`ref`) that is configured in the tiktok.me link, offering context about the conversation. You can incorporate the referral parameter in your tiktok.me link to monitor various links posted on different channels.
This parameter is a URL-encoded string with a maximum length of 2,083 characters.

Note: The `ref` parameter only supports alphanumeric characters and the special characters `-`, `_`, and `=`. | ####| prefilled_message | string | The prefilled message that is configured in the tiktok.me link. | ####| prefilled_message_audit_status | string | The audit status of the prefilled message.

Enum values:

  • `REJECT`: The message was rejected during the review. If `prefilled_message_audit_status` is `REJECT`, the `prefilled_message` will not be prefilled into the message input box.
  • `PASS`: The message passed the review.
| #| has_more | boolean | Whether an additional page of conversations is available.

Example: `false`. | #| cursor | integer | Cursor for the next page of conversations, to be passed in the `cursor` parameter of the subsequent API request.

Example: 13. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 0, "message": "OK", "request_id": "{{request_id}}", "data": { "conversations": [ { "referral": {}, "update_time": 1719447205701, "conversation_id": "{{conversation_id}}" }, { "referral": { "ad": [ { "advertiser_id": "{{advertiser_id}}", "ad_id": "{{ad_id}}", "timestamp": 1719389021, "ad_name": "{{ad_name}}", "embed_url": "https://www.tiktok.com/player/v1/1234567891234567891?music_info=1&description=1&autoplay=1&loop=1&utm_campaign=tt4d_open_api&utm_source=dm" } ] }, "update_time": 1719389022512, "conversation_id": "{{conversation_id}}" }, { "referral": { "short_link": [ { "ref": "{{ref}}", "prefilled_message": "{{message}}", "prefilled_message_audit_status": "PASS" } ] }, "update_time": 1719389022812, "conversation_id": "{{conversation_id}}" } ], "has_more": false, "cursor": 3 } } (/code) ```
